permissions.fallback_msg: This skill needs to run shell commands (e.g., shellcheck, find, xargs, sha256sum) to perform static analysis and linting of shell scripts. Please confirm before executing.
This skill needs to read shell script files and configuration files (e.g., .shellcheckrc, *.sh) within the workspace for analysis. Please confirm before reading.
This skill needs to create or modify files such as .shellcheckrc configuration files, pre-commit hooks, and cache files within the workspace. Please confirm before writing.
This skill may install ShellCheck via package managers (brew, apt-get) or build it from source. Please confirm before installing any packages.
This skill reads environment variables such as SHELLCHECK_SHELL, SHELLCHECK_STRICT, and SHELLCHECK_CONFIG to determine ShellCheck configuration. Please confirm before reading environment variables.
This skill sets environment variables such as SHELLCHECK_SHELL, SHELLCHECK_STRICT, and SHELLCHECK_CONFIG to configure ShellCheck behavior. Please confirm before setting environment variables.
This skill reads version-controlled shell script source files and repository contents to perform linting and static analysis. Please confirm before reading source code.
This skill may create or modify version-controlled shell scripts and CI/CD configuration files (e.g., GitHub Actions workflows, GitLab CI pipelines). Please confirm before writing source code.
This skill installs Git pre-commit hooks at .git/hooks/pre-commit to enforce ShellCheck linting before commits. Please confirm before installing any hooks.
This skill references process inspection (e.g., ps aux, pgrep) in the context of ShellCheck examples demonstrating SC2009 fixes. Please confirm before querying processes.
This skill references external resources such as the ShellCheck GitHub repository, ShellCheck Wiki, and error code reference at shellcheck.net. Please confirm before fetching web content.
